exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your coaching business forward
items: Define your coaching niche by identifying your specific expertise and target client demographic
Research and document the legal requirements for starting a coaching business in your location
Complete a comprehensive competitive analysis by researching 5-10 established coaches in your niche
Create your core coaching methodology by documenting your unique approach and process framework
Obtain professional coaching certification from an ICF-accredited program or equivalent credentialing body
Conduct 3-5 practice coaching sessions with friends or colleagues to test your methodology and gather feedback
